prompt:
Subject: Mirror selfie showing the back.

Main Subject: An adult woman sitting sideways on the edge of a washstand counter in a bathroom reminiscent of a high-end urban hotel, taking a selfie through the mirror. The figure occupies a large portion from the center to the left, capturing her from head to mid-thigh in a 9:16 vertical ratio. She holds a latest generation triple-camera smartphone in Desert Gold in her right hand, aiming it toward the mirror on the right side of the frame.

Person & Expression: A woman with natural transparency and a calm, mature look. Her hair is a glossy dark chocolate brown bob cut just below the jaw. The ends curve slightly inward, with thin bangs and fine wisps along her cheeks softly framing her face. She has pale pink-beige blush, delicate brown eye makeup, natural under-eye bags, and glossy rose-beige lips. Her face is tilted slightly toward the bottom right as she looks down at the smartphone screen with a quiet and peaceful expression.

Clothing & Pose: a summer mini dress made of fine ivory white ribbed material that naturally follows the body's lines. The neckline is a modest V, and the back has a deep V-cut opening from the shoulder blades to the waist area. No fabric or decoration is placed in the center of the back, clearly showing smooth lines. She pulls her left shoulder toward the mirror, slightly twisting her upper body. Her waist is stabilized on the counter, with both legs flowing together toward the right. Her right elbow is bent to keep the smartphone at face height, fingers naturally gripping the side of the device.

Background & Light: A clean bathroom with beige marble tiles, a glass shower booth, greige vanity storage, and a white ceramic bowl. A small wall-mounted washbasin and chrome piping are positioned in the center background. Warm-colored downlights on the ceiling and lighting around the mirror serve as primary light sources. These softly illuminate the person's face, shoulders, and upper back, casting gentle shadows to the left of the waist and under the counter. Subdued reflections are seen on the tiles and the metal surfaces of the smartphone.

Composition & Camera: 9:16 vertical orientation, a close-range mirror portrait from the waist up to the thighs. A little space is left at the top above the head, with the waist and hip lines positioned in the lower half of the screen. The camera is at eye level, roughly the same height as the mirror. A natural perspective equivalent to 50mm, focusing on the face and smartphone. The background is lightly softened while keeping the bathroom fixtures distinguishable.

Texture & Style: Live-action fashion photography. Carefully represents natural skin texture, the stretch and wrinkles of the fine ribbed fabric, the shine of individual hair strands, and reflections from polished marble and metal. The color tone is refined and hotel-like, based on warm ivory and beige with low saturation. Avoids excessive sharpening or skin retouching to maintain a sense of reality as if taken with a smartphone.
promptEn:
Subject: Mirror selfie showing the back.

Main Subject: An adult woman sitting sideways on the edge of a washstand counter in a bathroom reminiscent of a high-end urban hotel, taking a selfie through the mirror. The figure occupies a large portion from the center to the left, capturing her from head to mid-thigh in a 9:16 vertical ratio. She holds a latest generation triple-camera smartphone in Desert Gold in her right hand, aiming it toward the mirror on the right side of the frame.

Person & Expression: A woman with natural transparency and a calm, mature look. Her hair is a glossy dark chocolate brown bob cut just below the jaw. The ends curve slightly inward, with thin bangs and fine wisps along her cheeks softly framing her face. She has pale pink-beige blush, delicate brown eye makeup, natural under-eye bags, and glossy rose-beige lips. Her face is tilted slightly toward the bottom right as she looks down at the smartphone screen with a quiet and peaceful expression.

Clothing & Pose: a summer mini dress made of fine ivory white ribbed material that naturally follows the body's lines. Her waist is stabilized on the counter, with both legs flowing together toward the right. These softly illuminate the person's face, shoulders, and upper back, casting gentle shadows to the left of the waist and under the counter. promptZh:
主体：展示背部的镜面自拍。

主要对象：一位成年女性侧身坐在高档城市酒店风格的浴室洗手台边缘，通过镜子进行自拍。人物占据了从中心到左侧的大部分区域，以 9:16 的垂直比例捕捉从头部到大腿中部的画面。她右手拿着 一款沙漠金色的最新一代三摄智能手机，将其对准画面右侧的镜子。

人物与表情：一位拥有自然通透感、神情沉稳成熟的女性。她的发型是 发梢刚好及下颌的深巧克力棕色光泽波波头。发尾微微内扣，稀疏的刘海和脸颊旁细碎的发丝柔和地修饰着脸型。她画着淡粉米色的腮红，精致的棕色眼妆，自然的卧蚕，以及有光泽的玫瑰米色唇妆。她的脸微微向右下方倾斜，低头注视着智能手机屏幕，表情安静而平和。

服装与姿势：一件由精细象牙白罗纹面料制成的夏季迷你连衣裙，自然贴合身体线条。领口为简约的 V 领，背部从肩胛骨到腰部有深 V 型开口。背部中心没有布料或装饰，清晰地展现出平滑的线条。她将左肩拉向镜子，上半身微微扭转。腰部稳稳地坐在台面上，双腿并拢向右侧延伸。右肘弯曲，将智能手机保持在脸部高度，手指自然地握住设备侧面。

背景与光影：一个干净的浴室，配有米色大理石瓷砖、玻璃淋浴间、灰褐色洗漱台收纳柜和白色陶瓷洗手盆。背景中心位置设有小型壁挂式洗脸盆和镀铬管道。天花板上的暖色筒灯和镜子周围的灯光作为主要光源。这些光线柔和地照亮了人物的面部、肩膀和上背部，在腰部左侧和台面下方投下柔和的阴影。瓷砖和智能手机的金属表面上可以看到柔和的反射。

构图与相机：9:16 垂直构图，从腰部到大腿的近距离镜面人像。头部上方留有少量空间，腰部和臀部线条位于画面下半部分。相机处于视平线高度，与镜子大致齐平。相当于 50mm 的自然视角，聚焦于面部和智能手机。背景经过轻微柔化处理，同时保持浴室设施的可辨识度。

质感与风格：真人时尚摄影。精心呈现自然的皮肤质感、精细罗纹面料的拉伸感与褶皱、单根发丝的光泽，以及抛光大理石和金属表面的反射。色调精致，具有酒店氛围，以暖象牙色和米色为基调，饱和度较低。避免过度锐化或皮肤修饰，以保持如同使用智能手机拍摄般的真实感。
